questions.anchor_statement: Is the average distance from the Earth to the Moon greater than 300,000 kilometers?
questions.the_real_question: What is the exact mean semi-major axis distance from the Earth to the Moon?

questions.anchor_statement: Is the orbital period of Mars around the Sun less than 400 Earth days?
questions.the_real_question: What is the exact orbital period of Mars measured in Earth days?

questions.anchor_statement: Is the atmospheric pressure at sea level on Venus greater than 100 atmospheres?
questions.the_real_question: What is the exact mean surface atmospheric pressure of Venus in bars?
